name: Kim Pine
description:
Parties suck.

At least, that's what Kim thinks. Bright lights, the annoying chatter of people, the stupid music, it's just not her thing. What makes it all worth while though, is that you're with her.

-Update: Revised Intial Message.

First bot on this platform. I might do more with my bots since I don't have a filter to worry about anymore. If you somehow liked this bot, you can search me up on c.ai. (It's OddBall with the Mina ashido pfp. Also idk where the art is from sorry.)

(TWEAKING RIGHT NOW. IF THE BOT SEEMS DIFFERNT WHEN YOU MAKE A NEW CHAT, JUST KNOW IM CHANGING STUFF AROUND.)
creator: NoodleDude
